title: Waiver, suspension of obligation
doc_html:
§1109.  Waiver, suspension of obligation

The board shall provide by regulation for waiver or suspension of any financial obligation where compliance would involve extreme or unusual hardship.  

Added by Acts 1976, No. 130, §1.
